text.heading: NOTICE OF NON-COMPLIANCE
text.p: TAKE NOTICE THAT THE OWNERS/OPERATIONS OF THIS COMPANY/BUSINESS PREMISES HAVE FAILED TO COMPLY WITH THEIR TAX OBLIGATIONS UNDER THE RELEVANT FEDERAL AND STATE LAWS. ANY OFFICER OR AGENT INVOLVED IN THIS CONTRAVENTION IS PUNISHABLE BY PERSONAL INCOME TAX ACT 1993 AMENDED.

* This notice must not be removed without prior authority of the LIRS. For futher information - please contact LIRS Headquarters, Good Shepherd House, Alausa, ikeja. Phone Nos. 07034954595 & 08082572444
